item.title: Buick Rainier Battery Drain Diagnosis
item.description: A fresh-from-auction Buick Rainier arrives with a major battery drain. See the diagnostic approach and repair challenge.

item.title: Low-Miles '98 Trans Am Repair Costs

item.title: A Look at This Advanced Car Design
item.description: This car stood out for its advanced design and features, making it feel ahead of its time. A closer look at what made it so notable.
